titleStmt.title: SII 16.196: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 196. (A.R. No. 412 of 1911.) VOṆṬIMIṬṬA, SIDHAVATAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up near the eastern gōpura of the Kōdaṇḍarāmasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1477 (current), Ānanda, Śrāvaṇa śu. 12, corresponding to 1554 A.D., August 10.

The inscription records a gift of the villages Pulapatūru and its hamlet Renutūṁpalle by Gutti Tirumalayyadēva-mahārāju, and Bugepalle in Voṇṭimiṭṭa by Kañchiraju Yarrāju, and some wet lands in Voṇṭimiṭṭa to god Raghunāyaka of Voṇṭimiṭṭa for maintaining daily worship, monthly festivals and the pañchaparvas and offerings.
The gift villages are stated to be included in Udayagirirājya held by the donor as nāyaṅkara. The inscription is said to have been set up by Liṅgappa, son of Liṅgarāju Timmayya of Kālūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīrāmāya namaḥ . svastiśrī jayā
bhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 14
77 Agunēṭi Ānaṁddasaṁvatsara śrāvaṇa śu 12 lu
śrīman(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa
śrī vīra sadāsivadēvamahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁddu ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhu
lai pṛdhvisāmrājyaṁ cēyucunnupuṁḍḍaṁgānu śrīman(ṁ)smahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara Aṁtyaṁ
bbaragaṁḍḍa dharaṇīvaraha satyavrataparāyaṇa cāḷukyanārāyaṇulayina Ātrēyagō
tra sōmavaṁśādhīśvarulaina Āravīṭi rāmarājapautrulayina śrīraṁggarāja putrulayi
na gutti tirumalayyadēvamahārājuluṁgāru sadāsivadēvamahārāyalaku dakṣa
ṇa bhujādaṁḍḍuṁḍaipradhānikaṁ cēyucuṁnna tamanāyaṁkarānaku cellē vudayagi
ri rājyānaku lōnaina siddhavaṭṭaṁ sīmalōni sakaḷadēvatāsārvabhaumuṁḍayina sakalalōka śaraṇyu
ḍayina śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjaruṁḍaiyina dayivavēśyābhujaṁgguṁḍayina jāṁbbavatapra
tiṣṭitulayina voṁṭimeṭṭa śrīraghunāyakulaku nityakaṭṭaḍa Amṛtapaḷakunu Aṁggaraṁgga vaibha
vālakuṁnnu māsōtsavapaṁccaparvālakuṁnu nēmu dāravōsi yiccina potapināṭilōni
pulupatūru grāmamuṁnu yiṁddaku cellērenutūṁpallenu kaṁccirāju yarrāju Ayyadhā
ravōsi yiccina voṁṭimeṭṭalōni bugepallenu Aṁttupallelu 3 nu voṁṭimeṭṭa sthaḷānanu
ceruvu kiṁddanu cellivaccē varimaḍi ku 80 ki Arcana vrittimaḍi ku 50 vōyi nilicina
maḍi ku 30 lunnu yī palelu 3 kiṁni maḍikiṁnni kaligina (ṁ) Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmyasahitaṁ
gānu śrāvaṇa śuddha dvādasi puṇya(kāla)kālamaṁdu sahiraṁṇyōdakadānadhārāpū
rvakamugānu dāravōsi samarppiṁccinaṁduku śrīvatsagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbbhasūtraṁ ya
juśyākhādhyāyulaina kalūri liṁgarāju tiṁmmayya komāruṁḍu liṁggappaṁgāru
Ācaṁdrārkasthāyigānu vēyiṁccina śilāśāsanamu . yī śilāśāsanapaddhatiki yevvaru
tappi naḍacinānu gaṁggalōnu gōbrāṁhmaṇavadha sēsina dōṣānaṁ bōvuvāru kāsi
lōnu mātṛvadhasēsina pāpānaṁ bōvuvāru . gayalōnu śunakamāṁsamu
sēviṁcina pātakāna bōvuvāru . dānapālanayōrmadhyē . dānācchrēyō
nupālanaṁ . dānā t svargamavāpnōti . pālanādacyutaṁ ppadaṁ . sva
dattāṁ paradatāṁ vvā . yō harēti vasuṁdharā . ṣaṣṭirvarṣa sahasrāṇi .
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatēkrimi . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ . paradattā
nupālanaṁ . paradattapahārēṇa . svadattaṁ niṣpalaṁ bhavēt . śrīśrīśrī . Below this is engraved another inscription
Digital edition of SII 16.196 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
